title: [epic] Display UCI bus alignment (no back-channels)
description: Align battlespace-manager displays with o-my UCI bus architecture (o-my-w19). Subscribers only — no GulfWarEngine system of record, no HTTP to o-my-sim task-allocator/advisor for operational data. Parent tracking: o-my-w19.13 through w19.15, w19.12, w19.17.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-stack demo: displays on shared REDIS_URL with o-my processors; no sim-side correlator; HTTP back-channels documented as legacy fallback only

title: entity-display: fusion-pipeline bus topics
description: entity-display/api subscribes uci.entity + uci.entity.notification but not uci.correlated.entity; needs o-my entity-sorter REPUBLISH_ENTITY=1 for track geometry. Tracks o-my-w19.13.
acceptance_criteria: Cross-stack entity-display shows fused OPFOR tracks; optional subscribe uci.correlated.entity; feed_status labels o-my entity-sorter

title: battlespace-display: bus picture mode (replace GulfWarEngine truth)
description: run-battlespace-local.py embeds GulfWarEngine with memory:// bus; run-battlespace-redis.py uses wire_bus_handlers into engine — parallel fusion to o-my. Add BUS_PICTURE_MODE subscribing to o-my processor topics. Tracks o-my-w19.14.
acceptance_criteria: Picture SSE built from bus state not engine.snapshot() in cross-stack profile; BATTLESPACE_HARNESS unchanged for deterministic tests

title: battlespace-display: advisor via uci.agent.suggestion bus
description: oms_ai_services.py lists uci.agent.suggestion but pulls /api/advisor/snapshot over HTTP from mission-advisor. Subscribe to bus for suggestions and ISR assignments. Tracks o-my-w19.15.
acceptance_criteria: refresh_oms_ai_services ingests uci.agent.suggestion from RedisBus; HTTP snapshot is fallback only

title: battlespace-display: operator tasking via uci.task bus
description: _request_task() POSTs HTTP to o-my-sim task-allocator :8018 when GULFWAR_EXTERNAL_PROCESSING=1. Operator accept should use uci.task on shared bus (o-my target-allocator). Tracks o-my-w19.15.
acceptance_criteria: Strike/ISR accept publishes uci.task or scenario event on bus; TASK_ALLOCATOR_URL HTTP optional legacy mode

title: Shipped: battlespace F2T2EA harness (TST + unassigned filters)
description: battlespace-harness-scenario-v1.json, BATTLESPACE_HARNESS=1, task filter chips, GET /api/harness/verify. PR #8.
close_reason: Shipped on cursor/display-portal-1185; README screenshots + capture-display-screenshots.sh

title: Shipped: OMS AI service tracking in battlespace-display
description: oms_ai_services.py registry (mission-advisor, entity-sorter, task-allocator). AdvisorPanel gates recommendations on any_live. GET /api/oms-ai/services. ADVISOR_EMBEDDED=0 default.
close_reason: Shipped on cursor/display-portal-1185; README screenshots + capture-display-screenshots.sh

title: Shipped: operator display portal + landing pages
description: Merged on cursor/display-portal-1185. Shared display_landing.py probes all display UI/API ports and o-my Prometheus/Grafana. Portal :8888, API / and /landing on :8003/:8004/:8005, nginx /landing in docker. Screenshots in docs/images/displays/. Script: capture-display-screenshots.sh
close_reason: Shipped on cursor/display-portal-1185; README screenshots + capture-display-screenshots.sh

close_reason: Phase 3: D3 log/linear scale, SVG overlap connectors, spectrum viz research doc, walkthrough screenshots

title: RF 3.1 Spectrum viz research & design doc

close_reason: Phase 3: D3 log/linear scale, SVG overlap connectors, spectrum viz research doc, walkthrough screenshots

title: Tactical COP (Grok-refined): battlespace-manager operator picture
description:
Refined from Grok review: https://grok.com/share/c2hhcmQtMg_28836953-c53c-4879-865f-ef40890a1a41

Adapted to existing stack (not greenfield Vue):
- battlespace-display + entity-display (Svelte 5, Vite)
- Leaflet map with manual marker Map updates (Grok shallowRef pattern)
- FastAPI /api/picture + SSE /api/stream (GulfWarEngine; o-my Redis for entity-display)
- F2T2EA workflow rails already present

Grok priorities retained: sub-second updates, MIL-STD-2525D symbology (milsymbol), offline picture cache, RBAC gating, tactical HUD, TDD increments.

Deferred: full MapLibre migration, offline vector tiles (PMTiles), greenfield Pinia/Dexie app.
